projects.name: autoresearch
projects.description: AI agents running research on single-GPU nanochat training automatically
projects.note: 核心项目，适合关注 agent 如何深入参与训练研究闭环的人。

projects.name: deer-flow
projects.description: An open-source long-horizon SuperAgent harness that researches, codes, and creates.
projects.note: 核心项目，更像完整工作台，适合偏产品化和复杂任务编排场景。

projects.name: gpt-researcher
projects.description: An autonomous agent that conducts deep research on any data using any LLM providers
projects.note: 核心项目，成熟度高，适合快速体验成型 research agent 产品。
